name: Classic Tomato Pasta
steps: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente.
Saute chopped onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add chopped tomatoes and simmer 10 minutes.
Toss the drained pasta in the sauce and serve.

name: Veggie Fried Rice
steps: Scramble the eggs and set aside.
Stir-fry onion, garlic, carrot and peas.
Add cooked rice and soy sauce.
Mix in the eggs and stir-fry for 2 minutes.

name: Cheese Omelette
steps: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
Pour eggs, add cheese as they set.
Fold and serve warm.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
steps: Slice chicken and vegetables.
Stir-fry chicken until golden.
Add vegetables, garlic and ginger.
Pour soy sauce and cook 5 more minutes.

name: Garlic Butter Toast
steps: Mix softened butter with minced garlic and salt.
Spread over bread slices.
Toast until golden and crisp.

name: Tomato Onion Salad
steps: Chop tomatoes and onions.
Add olive oil, lemon juice and salt.
Toss and chill before serving.

name: Potato Curry
steps: Saute onion, garlic and ginger in oil.
Add tomato and spices, cook to a paste.
Add cubed potatoes and water.
Simmer until potatoes are tender.

name: Pancakes
steps: Whisk flour, egg, milk, sugar and salt into a batter.
Heat a buttered pan.
Pour batter and cook until bubbles form.
Flip and cook the other side.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
steps: Butter the outside of two bread slices.
Place cheese between them.
Grill in a pan until golden on both sides.

name: Vegetable Soup
steps: Chop all vegetables.
Saute onion and garlic.
Add the rest with water and simmer 20 minutes.
Season and serve hot.
